UG-38  SUPPLEMENTARY RULES FOR REINFORCEMENT CALCULATIONS. (a) When the reinforcement area calculation of UG-37 is performed, the available area shall be computed within the limits of reinforcement defined in UG-40. (b) The required thickness of the shell shall be as determined in accordance with UG-27 for internal pressure or UG-28 for external pressure. (c) The strength reduction factor for nozzles operating at different temperatures shall be applied. The nozzle wall thickness used in the calculation shall comply with UG-44. For multiple openings in proximity, ligament efficiency shall be verified per UW-13. See also UG-36 for general opening requirements.
